# Twent Documentation
# https://twent.xyz/docs

## Documentation Structure

### Getting Started
- [Installation](https://twent.xyz/docs#installation) - How to install Twent on Android
- [First Setup](https://twent.xyz/docs#first-setup) - Configuring your first AI model
- [Your First Chat](https://twent.xyz/docs#first-chat) - Starting your first conversation
- [Permissions](https://twent.xyz/docs#permissions) - Required and optional permissions

### Chat Features
- [Chat Overview](https://twent.xyz/docs#chat-overview) - Main chat features and capabilities
- [Chat Styles](https://twent.xyz/docs#chat-styles) - Cursor and bubble display modes
- [Floating Chat](https://twent.xyz/docs#floating-chat) - Using Twent in overlay mode

### Tools (40+ Built-in Tools)
- [Tools Overview](https://twent.xyz/docs#tools-overview) - All available tools
- [File System](https://twent.xyz/docs#file-system) - Read, write, search files
- [Shell & Terminal](https://twent.xyz/docs#shell) - Ubuntu terminal and commands
- [Web Tools](https://twent.xyz/docs#web) - Fetch pages, search, download
- [Media Tools](https://twent.xyz/docs#media) - FFmpeg, camera, OCR, TTS/STT
- [UI Automation](https://twent.xyz/docs#ui-automation) - Tap, swipe, type, screenshot
- [JavaScript](https://twent.xyz/docs#javascript) - Run JS/TS with Node.js
- [MCP Tools](https://twent.xyz/docs#mcp) - Model Context Protocol servers

### Automation
- [Automation Overview](https://twent.xyz/docs#automation-overview) - UI automation, workflows, triggers
- [Tasker Integration](https://twent.xyz/docs#tasker) - Connect with Tasker app

### Packages & Marketplace
- [Packages Overview](https://twent.xyz/docs#packages-overview) - Extension system
- [Skills](https://twent.xyz/docs#skills) - AI behavior bundles
- [Marketplace](https://twent.xyz/docs#marketplace) - Browse and install community packages

### Workflows
- [Workflows Overview](https://twent.xyz/docs#workflows-overview) - Multi-step automations
- [Workflow Examples](https://twent.xyz/docs#workflow-examples) - Real-world examples

### More Features
- [Memory](https://twent.xyz/docs#memory) - Persistent knowledge storage
- [Voice](https://twent.xyz/docs#voice) - TTS, STT, wake word detection
- [Settings](https://twent.xyz/docs#settings) - Deep customization options
- [Toolbox](https://twent.xyz/docs#toolbox) - Built-in utility screens
- [Tool Reference](https://twent.xyz/docs#tool-reference) - Complete parameter reference

## Key Concepts

### Tools
Twent has 40+ built-in tools that give AI real capabilities on your device:
- File system operations
- Shell command execution
- Web browsing and search
- Media processing
- UI automation
- JavaScript execution
- MCP server integration

### Automation
Twent automates anything on Android:
- UI automation (tap, swipe, type)
- Shell commands and scripts
- Android intents
- Workflow triggers and conditions
- Tasker integration

### Packages
Extension system for Twent:
- Skills: AI behavior bundles
- MCP Servers: External tool providers
- Plugins: JS/TS tool bundles
- Workflows: Pre-built automations

### Privacy
Twent is privacy-first:
- BYOK (Bring Your Own Key)
- Local AI models
- No telemetry
- Encrypted storage
- Full data ownership

## Technical Details
- Android 8.0+ (API 26)
- arm64-v8a architecture
- 3GB RAM recommended
- 500MB+ storage
- No root required

## Links
- Main Website: https://twent.xyz
- Documentation: https://twent.xyz/docs
- GitHub: https://github.com/user/operit
- Download: https://twent.xyz (or GitHub releases)
